verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.king_james: And the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, quid fiet de ligno vitis,  ex omnibus lignis nemorum  quæ sunt inter ligna silvarum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם מַה־יִּהְיֶ֥ה עֵץ־הַגֶּ֖פֶן מִכׇּל־עֵ֑ץ הַזְּמוֹרָ֕ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָיָ֖ה בַּעֲצֵ֥י הַיָּֽעַר׃
verses.king_james: Son of man, What is the vine tree more than any tree, or than a branch which is among the trees of the forest?

verses.latin_vulgate: numquid tolletur de ea lignum ut fiat opus,  aut fabricabitur de ea paxillus  ut dependeat in eo quodcumque vas ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲיֻקַּ֤ח מִמֶּ֙נּוּ֙ עֵ֔ץ לַעֲשׂ֖וֹת לִמְלָאכָ֑ה אִם־יִקְח֤וּ מִמֶּ֙נּוּ֙ יָתֵ֔ד לִתְל֥וֹת עָלָ֖יו כׇּל־כֶּֽלִי׃
verses.king_james: Shall wood be taken thereof to do any work? or will men take a pin of it to hang any vessel thereon?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce igni datum est in escam :  utramque partem ejus consumpsit ignis,  et medietas ejus redacta est in favillam :  numquid utile erit ad opus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֥ה לָאֵ֖שׁ נִתַּ֣ן לְאׇכְלָ֑ה אֵת֩ שְׁנֵ֨י קְצוֹתָ֜יו אָכְלָ֤ה הָאֵשׁ֙ וְתוֹכ֣וֹ נָחָ֔ר הֲיִצְלַ֖ח לִמְלָאכָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Behold, it is cast into the fire for fuel; the fire devoureth both the ends of it, and the midst of it is burned. Is it meet for any work?

verses.latin_vulgate: Etiam cum esset integrum,  non erat aptum ad opus :  quanto magis cum illud ignis devoraverit et combusserit,  nihil ex eo fiet operis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּה֙ בִּֽהְיוֹת֣וֹ תָמִ֔ים לֹ֥א יֵעָשֶׂ֖ה לִמְלָאכָ֑ה אַ֣ף כִּי־אֵ֤שׁ אֲכָלַ֙תְהוּ֙ וַיֵּחָ֔ר וְנַעֲשָׂ֥ה ע֖וֹד לִמְלָאכָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Behold, when it was whole, it was meet for no work: how much less shall it be meet yet for any work, when the fire hath devoured it, and it is burned?

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Quomodo lignum vitis inter ligna silvarum,  quod dedi igni ad devorandum,  sic tradam habitatores Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר עֵץ־הַגֶּ֙פֶן֙ בְּעֵ֣ץ הַיַּ֔עַר אֲשֶׁר־נְתַתִּ֥יו לָאֵ֖שׁ לְאׇכְלָ֑ה כֵּ֣ן נָתַ֔תִּי אֶת־יֹשְׁבֵ֖י יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God; As the vine tree among the trees of the forest, which I have given to the fire for fuel, so will I give the inhabitants of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ponam faciem meam in eos :  de igne egredientur,  et ignis consumet eos :  et scietis quia ego Dominus,  cum posuero faciem meam in eos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֤י אֶת־פָּנַי֙ בָּהֶ֔ם מֵהָאֵ֣שׁ יָצָ֔אוּ וְהָאֵ֖שׁ תֹּאכְלֵ֑ם וִֽידַעְתֶּם֙ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה בְּשׂוּמִ֥י אֶת־פָּנַ֖י בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And I will set my face against them; they shall go out from one fire, and another fire shall devour them; and ye shall know that I am the Lord, when I set my face against them.

verses.latin_vulgate: et dedero terram inviam et desolatam,  eo quod prævaricatores extiterint,  dicit Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֥י אֶת־הָאָ֖רֶץ שְׁמָמָ֑ה יַ֚עַן מָ֣עֲלוּ מַ֔עַל נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And I will make the land desolate, because they have committed a trespass, saith the Lord God.
